base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ending_hero_thank_you_screens — a ui (menu_screen) from 1986 castlevania. 2 ending messages: 'AND THE HERO - SIMON BELMONDO' (Japanese spelling of Belmont) + 'YOU PLAYED THE GREATEST ROLE IN THIS STORY.
